sigWerErrors.reason: '不用了' (don't need) vs '不要了' (don't want) changes the intent from not needing to not wanting, which can affect the meaning but is still understandable in context.
Again, '不用' (don't need) vs '不要' (don't want) changes the nuance of the sentence, but the overall intent is still clear.
'这个邮箱' (this email) vs '的邮箱' (my email) changes the reference, but in context, it is still understandable as referring to the same email.
Omitting '个' (a measure word) is a minor grammatical error in Chinese and does not change the meaning of the sentence.
